【Saint Laurent】🌈Premium Exclusive🔥Black/Gold
New BEA Tote Bag, leather buckle closure, decorated with LE CASSANDRE. Spacious interior with matching suede lining, featuring one main compartment and an internal zip pocket. Size: 50x28x18cm

items.name_en: 【YSL Saint Laurent Premium Replica】Produced by overseas factories, original overseas stock, original factory hardware and leather, passes customs and counters easily. For high-end customers only. Medium size, counter best-seller. Logo buckle flip-top shoulder and crossbody bag. Leather uses original authentic fine grain toothpick grain Box calfskin, which is the best part of top-grade leather. Hand-rolled using an ancient method to preserve the natural feel, so the hand feel and flexibility are excellent, not too delicate, relatively durable. Front features a flip-top with a rotating YSL metal buckle. The new "L" letter opens half up and half down, designed by a famous watchmaker. The logo rotates open. A brand-new improved metal closure design that fits perfectly. Features elegant rounded leather quilting piping. Exquisite handcrafting. Adjustable leather shoulder strap, very comfortable to wear. Interior features a three-layer accordion pocket and a thoughtful card slot, easily accommodating daily essentials. Wear it elegantly on the shoulder or casually crossbody. The simple design and smooth lines make the style very versatile. Paired with the classic retro gold copper logo, it's truly a bag you'll love the more you look at it!

items.name_cn:
#June Box#
YSL's new JUNE quilted calfskin box bag. The small body has a nice amount of space. The bag features a front flap and a structured bucket shape. The craftsmanship is extremely complex, featuring a Y-letter swirl design and diamond quilting. Fashion is truly a cycle; this new small box bag has a bright vintage look!!
 Dimensions: 19 X 15 X 8 cm

items.name_cn:
▪️ Mini Toy Shopping▪️
New Mini Tote Shopping Bag, small but surprisingly spacious! No extra compartments inside for personalized storage. Made from original factory plain calfskin, though plain calfskin is often thought to be stiff, this one is surprisingly soft, giving the bag a particularly high-end texture! No large logo, just a small and exquisite YSL charm and a row of brand engraved gold foil! Perfect for you who are low-key and sophisticated!
Model No.: 712367
Size: 18x17x8cm

items.name_cn:
◽Kate 99 ◽
When it comes to the hottest bags of these past two years, the shoulder bag must be mentioned! Carried with a thin strap, the bag sits perfectly under the arm, freeing your hands and making your arms look longer and more free. Carrying this small bag creates a seamless look with your outfit, giving off a carefree French elegance that makes you look effortlessly stylish. It also comes with a long leather strap for different carrying styles! One bag, multiple uses! Model S08043, Size: 26x13.5x4.5cm
